## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📋 USSD catalog update (new/changed/removed code)
- [ ] 💄 UI change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)

## Catalog Changes Only

<!-- Delete this section if the PR does not touch ussd_codes.json -->

- Source for the code change (ETECSA announcement, official page, verified on device):

## Checklist

- [ ] The project builds without warnings (`xcodegen generate` + Xcode build)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Code, comments and identifiers are in English
- [ ] UI changes respect the brand palette (navy `rgb(0,0,102)`, cyan `#09C`, black, white)
- [ ] I tested on a device or simulator (specify which below)
